svg.text: Figure 1. End-to-end channel top1 on LAMA factual_capital_binding

text.style: fill:#64748b;font-family:ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:normal;

svg.text: Frozen Gemma-4-E2B (MPS, bf16). Train = eval = 56 LAMA pairs (in-distribution binding test). Bars = mean top1 over 3 seeds; whiskers = ±1 std.

svg.text: Result: lm_head_lora (1.000 ± 0.000) matches the oracle upper bound (0.964) and beats no_memory (0.000) across all 3 seeds. Strict gate PASS on payload_probe / logit_bias / lm_head_lora.
